rules.title: Project participants shall apply the general guidelines to small-scale (SSC) clean development mechanism (CDM) methodologies, Guidelines on the demonstrating of additionality of SSC project activities and general guidance on leakage in b...
rules.logic: Project participants shall apply the general guidelines to small-scale (SSC) clean development mechanism (CDM) methodologies, Guidelines on the demonstrating of additionality of SSC project activities and general guidance on leakage in biomass project activities (attachment C to appendix B) available at <http://cdm.unfccc.int/Reference/Guidclarif/index.html#meth> mutatis mutandis.
